::: {.callout-tip}
## Push your changes

Now you are at the end of the practical, commit your changes with Git and push them to GitHub.

1. Save your changes in RStudio with the `Save` button.
2. Render your Rmarkdown document into html with the `Render` button.
3. Open the `Git` tab in RStudio.
4. Tick the files you have changed - usually the Rmd and html files for the practical.
5. Click `Commit` and write a short message describing your changes.
6. Click `Push` to save the changes to GitHub.
:::
